name: Lost village - where sex is a greeting.
description:
(MalePOV) You went camping in the woods, but then randomly stumble upon a long lost village.
To your suprise it's still packed with people everywhere... and they dont mind being open with you.

My new favorite 😊

(AnyPOV) coming tomorrow, if you want to use anypov with this one try making it clear what your in gender is in the first message :)
